summary: Verstappen hunts redemption at Spa after successive high-speed crashes force Red Bull to revert to a conventional rear wing, while Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli signals a breakthrough performance with Friday's fastest time. Norris carries a damaging 10-place grid penalty into the weekend, gifting McLaren a tactical headache as the team juggles strategy against a resurgent Mercedes threat. Victory here would prove crucial for either Verstappen to arrest Red Bull's recent troubles or Antonelli to establish himself as a championship contender heading into the season's final stretch.
